NVFP4 activation global amax (g_amax) study — per-layer comparison

g_amax = stored input_scale × 6 × 448, aggregated (mean) across MoE experts. Variants: ref-max (default dataset, max calib), act-max-p5 (nvfp4_act_max, b_min_percentile=5), ref-code (coding calib, max), ref-reasoning (reasoning calib, max).

Run configuration

Recipe YAML files used

general/ptq/nvfp4_mlp_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Composed PTQ recipe for MLP/MoE-only dynamic NVFP4 quantization with FP8 KV-cache cast mode.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Applies dynamic NVFP4 only to MLP/MoE weight and input quantizers, plus FP8 KV-cache
    cast mode using constant amax; uses max calibration.
quantize:
  algorithm: max
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*mlp*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*mlp*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*block_sparse_moe*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*block_sparse_moe*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*.experts.*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*.experts.*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
general/ptq/nvfp4_act_max_mlp_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Composed PTQ recipe for MLP/MoE-only dynamic NVFP4 quantization with FP8 KV-cache cast mode,
# using the nvfp4_act_max calibration algorithm: max for weights, B_min-anchored global-scale
# calibration for the NVFP4 activation (input) quantizers. See
# experimental/nvfp4_global_scale_study/ for the recipe derivation.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Applies dynamic NVFP4 only to MLP/MoE weight and input quantizers, plus FP8 KV-cache
    cast mode using constant amax; uses nvfp4_act_max calibration (max weights, B_min-anchored
    activation global scale).
quantize:
  algorithm:
    method: nvfp4_act_max
    rho: 16384
    b_min_percentile: 5
    b_max_percentile: 99.99
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*mlp*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*mlp*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*block_sparse_moe*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*block_sparse_moe*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*.experts.*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*.experts.*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
general/ptq/nvfp4_lm_mlp_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# MLP-only dynamic NVFP4 for the LANGUAGE MODEL of a VLM (decoder MLP under
# model.language_model.*), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode. The vision tower and MTP head
# (model.visual.*, mtp.*) are left in BF16. Uses max calibration.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Dynamic NVFP4 on the language-model MLP weight and input quantizers only
    (*language_model*mlp*), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode; max calibration. Vision tower and
    MTP head stay BF16.
quantize:
  algorithm: max
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
general/ptq/nvfp4_act_max_lm_mlp_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# MLP-only NVFP4 for the LANGUAGE MODEL of a VLM, using the nvfp4_act_max calibration
# algorithm (max weights, B_min-anchored activation global scale, b_min_percentile=5),
# plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode. Vision tower and MTP head stay BF16.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Dynamic NVFP4 on the language-model MLP only (*language_model*mlp*) with nvfp4_act_max
    calibration (B_min-anchored activation global scale, b_min_percentile=5), plus FP8
    KV-cache cast mode. Vision tower and MTP head stay BF16.
quantize:
  algorithm:
    method: nvfp4_act_max
    rho: 16384
    b_min_percentile: 5
    b_max_percentile: 99.99
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
general/ptq/nvfp4_lm_experts_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Routed-experts-only dynamic NVFP4 for the LANGUAGE MODEL of a MoE VLM
# (*language_model*mlp.experts*), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode. Shared experts, router gate,
# attention, vision tower and MTP head are left in BF16. Uses max calibration.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Dynamic NVFP4 on the routed MoE experts of the language model only
    (*language_model*mlp.experts*), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode; max calibration. Shared
    experts, router, vision tower and MTP head stay BF16.
quantize:
  algorithm: max
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp.experts*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp.experts*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
general/ptq/nvfp4_act_max_lm_experts_only-kv_fp8_cast
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Routed-experts-only NVFP4 for the LANGUAGE MODEL of a MoE VLM, using the nvfp4_act_max
# calibration algorithm (max weights, B_min-anchored activation global scale,
# b_min_percentile=5), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode. Shared experts, router, vision tower and
# MTP head stay BF16.

imports:
  base_disable_all: configs/ptq/units/base_disable_all
  default_disabled_quantizers: configs/ptq/units/default_disabled_quantizers
  nvfp4: configs/numerics/nvfp4
  kv_fp8_cast: configs/ptq/units/kv_fp8_cast

metadata:
  recipe_type: ptq
  description: >-
    Dynamic NVFP4 on the routed MoE experts of the language model only
    (*language_model*mlp.experts*) with nvfp4_act_max calibration (B_min-anchored activation
    global scale, b_min_percentile=5), plus FP8 KV-cache cast mode. Shared experts, router,
    vision tower and MTP head stay BF16.
quantize:
  algorithm:
    method: nvfp4_act_max
    rho: 16384
    b_min_percentile: 5
    b_max_percentile: 99.99
  quant_cfg:
    - $import: base_disable_all
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp.experts*weight_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - quantizer_name: '*language_model*mlp.experts*input_quantizer'
      cfg:
        $import: nvfp4
    - $import: kv_fp8_cast
    - $import: default_disabled_quantizers
